creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

> … seems to work nicely in relevant areas of docs.freebsd.org …

(In reply to Pau Amma from comment #4, and Graham Perrin from comment #6)

<https://gist.github.com/grahamperrin/f8d093c17d870b92d92ade8adcd2f8b7#file-accessibility-md> 

Briefly: 

* Yale University's advice about non-colour indicators seems relevant

* I used WAVE, and at least one other tool, to check the home page of the 
  FreeBSD documentation portal, and the FAQ page. 

For both pages, there was no detectable problem with appearance of links. 

HTH
